title: Sour American Cheese Curd Crumble
description: A tender and adventurous cheese crumble made from sour cheese curds, featuring a perfect balance of tanginess and texture for an irresistible breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Freshly Ground Flax Eggs (optional, for binding)
ingredients.notes: Mix 1 part flax seeds with 3 parts water to create egg-like consistency.

instructions: In a bowl, combine cheese curds, melted coconut oil, flax seeds, and almond milk powder. If using, add the freshly ground flax eggs for binding.
Transfer the mixture into an oven-safe dish or ramekin.
Bake in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from oven and let it cool slightly before serving.
